profiles.name: AI Builder
profiles.tagline: Turn AI capabilities into working systems and intelligent applications.
profiles.description: AI Builders create technical value by engineering AI systems, agents, and automated workflows. They translate capabilities into functioning code and infrastructure. Their advantage comes from turning ideas into working systems faster than competitors, which creates defensible technical advantages and product differentiation.
profiles.signature_question: What can I build with AI that doesn't exist yet?
strengths: Deep technical understanding of AI capabilities and limitations
Ability to prototype and iterate quickly
Can identify and solve technical bottlenecks
Build defensible products through superior implementation
blind_spots: May optimize for technical elegance over market demand
Risk of over-engineering solutions before validating need
Often underestimate go-to-market and business complexity
Can be disconnected from how end users actually want to work
opportunities: Building custom AI agents for specific industries or workflows
Creating developer tools and platforms that abstract AI complexity
Developing specialized AI models fine-tuned for niche domains
Building internal AI infrastructure for organizations
Creating APIs or integrations that give enterprises AI capabilities
skills_to_develop: Understanding product-market fit and user validation
Business model thinking and unit economics
Communicating technical value to non-technical stakeholders
Software architecture for scalable AI systems
Staying current with rapidly evolving AI capabilities
recommended_actions: Build a small AI tool or agent and share it with real users—measure engagement
Study one non-technical domain deeply to understand where AI creates real value
Learn the business models of successful AI companies in your space
Collaborate with operators and strategists to understand organizational constraints
Document your technical decisions and learnings in a public way

profiles.name: AI Operator
profiles.tagline: Integrate AI into workflows to create operational leverage and measurable results.
profiles.description: AI Operators create value by embedding AI into existing processes, systems, and teams to drive efficiency and enable better decision-making. Their advantage comes from deeply understanding how organizations actually work and deploying AI solutions that fit seamlessly into real workflows, creating measurable productivity gains and competitive advantage.
profiles.signature_question: How can AI make what we're already doing faster, cheaper, or better?
strengths: Expert at understanding organizational processes and workflows
Pragmatic about implementation constraints and feasibility
Skilled at measuring and demonstrating ROI from AI adoption
Build trust within organizations through reliable delivery
blind_spots: May default to incremental improvements over transformative opportunities
Risk of anchoring to current processes rather than reimagining them
Often constrained by organizational inertia and legacy systems
Can underestimate the potential of completely new AI-first approaches
opportunities: AI-powered process automation that reduces operational costs
Implementing AI-based decision support systems for complex workflows
Training teams to use AI tools effectively in their daily work
Building AI-enhanced internal tools that multiply team productivity
Consulting on AI adoption strategies for established organizations
skills_to_develop: Change management and organizational psychology
Data literacy and understanding data quality requirements
Identifying and prioritizing high-ROI use cases systematically
Building AI literacy in non-technical teams
Measuring and communicating business impact
recommended_actions: Audit your current work for 3-5 repetitive tasks where AI could save time daily
Experiment with AI tools in your existing workflows and document results
Study an industry adjacent to yours to see how they're using AI operationally
Learn to speak the language of business impact and cost savings
Mentor others on practical AI adoption rather than keeping it to yourself

profiles.name: AI Creator
profiles.tagline: Amplify creative output and human expression through AI collaboration.
profiles.description: AI Creators generate value by using AI as a creative partner to produce content, design, communication, and new forms of expression at scale. Their advantage comes from combining human judgment, taste, and intention with AI's generative capabilities, creating unique value that's difficult to replicate without both human and AI contributions.
profiles.signature_question: What new creative possibilities open up when I use AI as my collaborator?
strengths: Develop unique creative voices and perspectives
Rapidly prototype and iterate on creative ideas
Produce higher volume of creative output without burnout
Combine human taste with AI capabilities for novel results
blind_spots: Risk of derivative or generic output if relying too heavily on AI defaults
Audiences may discount work perceived as AI-generated rather than handmade
Hard to build sustainable business models around creative output alone
Can struggle to develop deep expertise when moving quickly
opportunities: Building personal brand through consistent high-volume creative output
Creating multimedia content (writing, design, music, video) at scale
Offering AI-augmented creative services to small businesses or creators
Developing AI tools specifically designed for creative workflows
Publishing or licensing creative work at new price points
skills_to_develop: Mastery of generative AI tools specific to your medium
Strong creative judgment and taste to curate AI outputs
Building an audience and community around creative work
Understanding copyright and ethical considerations
Storytelling and communication of your creative vision
recommended_actions: Create one piece of creative work per week using AI tools and publish it
Develop a distinct point of view about what makes good creative work
Study creators who are successfully building audiences with AI-assisted work
Experiment with combining multiple AI tools to create something novel
Engage directly with your audience about your creative process

profiles.name: AI Entrepreneur
profiles.tagline: Identify opportunities, validate markets, and build AI-powered businesses.
profiles.description: AI Entrepreneurs create value by recognizing gaps in the market, validating customer need, and building scalable businesses that deliver AI-enabled solutions. Their advantage comes from combining market insight, customer empathy, and execution speed to capture emerging opportunities before they become commoditized.
profiles.signature_question: What problem are customers willing to pay for that AI can uniquely solve?
strengths: Skilled at identifying market gaps and customer needs
Move quickly from idea to validation and iteration
Build relationships with customers and stakeholders
Comfortable with uncertainty and adapting based on feedback
blind_spots: May pursue opportunities before technology is mature enough
Risk of building products faster than the market can adopt them
Often underestimate the time required to build reliable AI systems
Can prioritize growth over sustainable unit economics
opportunities: Building SaaS products that wrap AI capabilities for specific verticals
Creating AI-powered services that directly serve end customers
Licensing AI models or datasets to other businesses
Offering AI implementation consulting for enterprises
Building B2B2C platforms that embed AI capabilities for partners
skills_to_develop: Deep understanding of your customer's business and economics
Ability to identify and validate product-market fit rigorously
Sales and customer acquisition strategies
Unit economics and financial modeling for sustainable growth
Team building and organizational scaling
recommended_actions: Talk to 20+ potential customers about their biggest problems in your space
Build a minimal prototype and get it in users' hands within 1 month
Track your unit economics carefully from day one
Network with other entrepreneurs and investors in the AI space
Focus on one specific customer segment and own it deeply

profiles.name: AI Strategist
profiles.tagline: Guide organizations through AI transformation and recognize emerging opportunities.
profiles.description: AI Strategists create value by understanding AI's broader implications, identifying where transformative change is happening, and guiding organizations or industries through strategic transitions. Their advantage comes from synthesizing technical, market, organizational, and societal perspectives to make decisions that position stakeholders for long-term success.
profiles.signature_question: What systemic changes is AI enabling, and how should we prepare for them?
strengths: Synthesize complex information from multiple domains
Identify emerging trends and inflection points early
Build credibility through deep domain expertise
Make decisions that account for second and third-order effects
blind_spots: Can be detached from day-to-day execution and real constraints
Risk of being wrong on emerging trends with high confidence
May overlook small, immediate opportunities while focused on big picture
Insights only create value if organizations actually act on them
opportunities: Executive advisory and board positions guiding AI strategy
Industry research and trend analysis that informs competitive strategy
Keynote speaking and thought leadership building influence
Consulting on organizational transformation and change management
Teaching and mentoring the next generation of AI leaders
skills_to_develop: Deep knowledge of both AI capabilities and organizational dynamics
Ability to communicate complex ideas clearly to diverse audiences
Scenario planning and strategic foresight methodologies
Understanding of economics, policy, and societal implications
Influencing without direct authority
recommended_actions: Develop a clear perspective on one major AI trend and write about it
Identify the 3 most important decisions your industry will face from AI
Build relationships with leaders in your domain and stay deeply informed
Create a platform to share strategic insights regularly
Advise at least one organization on their AI strategy
